facts: Operates a facility located at 1720 Knox Bridge Crossing Rd, 30553, Lavonia / GA – US.
The Georgia facility has a total size of 4.100m².

Directions to the plant state: Coming from Atlanta take exit 177 on I-85 South, turn right, at the 4 way stop sign turn left – plant is visible on the left hand side; coming from Greenville take exit 177 on I-85 North, turn left, at the 4 way stop sign turn left – plant is visible on the left hand side.
